data.title: Implement REBASE_HEAD filtering in capture-review-diff.sh
data.description:
## Description

Add REBASE_HEAD detection after existing MERGE_HEAD block (~line 51) in plugins/dso/scripts/capture-review-diff.sh. Mirror pattern: detect REBASE_HEAD, read onto/orig-head from rebase state dir, compute merge base, restrict diff pathspecs to worktree-branch files. Use git rev-parse --git-dir. Fail-open.

## TDD Requirement
The 2 RED tests from task 492b-976f turn GREEN.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/capture-review-diff.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] REBASE_HEAD detection in capture-review-diff.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'REBASE_HEAD' plugins/dso/scripts/capture-review-diff.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: ! grep -q 'capture-review-diff.*\[test_capture_diff_rebase' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
